top3.sql:
SELECT r.raceId, r.name, res.points
FROM results res
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
ORDER BY r.year, r.round
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.raceId, r.name, res.points
FROM results res
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
ORDER BY r.year, r.round
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.raceId, r.name, res.points
FROM results res
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
ORDER BY r.date
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.raceId, r.name, res.points

JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
ORDER BY r.year, r.round
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.raceId, r.name, res.points
FROM results res
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
ORDER BY r.date
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT r.raceId, r.name, res.points
FROM results res
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
ORDER BY r.year, r.round
LIMIT 1;
